title: conyza ciliaris
intro: Conyza ciliaris, also known as Fleabane or Horseweed, is a perennial plant that belongs to the daisy family Asteraceae. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal activities. The health benefits of Conyza ciliaris include reducing fever, relieving pain and inflammation, and treating respiratory issues such as coughs and colds. Conyza ciliaris can be prepared as a herbal tea, tincture, or infused oil, making it a versatile remedy for various health conditions.
